headline: Sabah Tourism Revenue Falls RM2.3 Billion Short of Target
context: Sabah Tourism Board reported 2025 revenue of RM5.7 billion against RM8 billion target with international arrivals 35% below 2019.

cards.big: Sabah tourism revenue missed 2025 target by RM2.3 billion
cards.sub: International arrivals remain 35% below pre-pandemic 2019 levels

cards.big: China tourist arrivals dropped 62% from 2019 to only 180,000 in 2025
cards.sub: Flight connections to KK from Chinese cities reduced from 28 to 11 weekly

cards.big: Mount Kinabalu park limited capacity to 135 climbers per day from 185
cards.sub: Conservation restrictions reduced revenue by RM18 million but improved trails

cards.big: Sipadan diving permits now cost RM250 versus RM40 in 2019
cards.sub: Revenue increase offset by 45% drop in permit applications from international divers

cards.big: Tourism recovery tests whether Sabah can rebuild access without sacrificing conservation
RM2.3 billion below tourism targets — Sabah's potential requires infrastructure, not just marketing campaigns.
